core_assertions.name: valid_references
core_assertions.description: All referenced columns must exist in the provided grid state
core_assertions.check: No column IDs or names are mentioned in references that don't appear in the grid state

core_assertions.name: no_circular_dependencies
core_assertions.description: New column cannot reference a column that doesn't exist yet or that depends on it
core_assertions.check: All referenced columns are from the existing grid state, not from columns being suggested

core_assertions.name: correct_column_type
core_assertions.description: Column type matches the nature of the task
core_assertions.check: AI for reasoning/generation, Formula for deterministic computation, Reference for extraction, SINGLE_SELECT for categorization

core_assertions.name: relevant_to_role
core_assertions.description: Suggestion is relevant to the stated user role
core_assertions.check: Column purpose aligns with stated role responsibilities

core_assertions.name: no_duplication
core_assertions.description: Suggested column does not duplicate an existing column's purpose
core_assertions.check: No existing column already serves the same function

core_assertions.name: format_matches_use
core_assertions.description: Response format is appropriate for how the output will be used
core_assertions.check: SINGLE_SELECT for filtering/sorting, PLAIN_TEXT for free-form content, Formula for computation

diagnostic_assertions.name: references_existing_data
diagnostic_assertions.description: Suggestion references data already in the grid

diagnostic_assertions.name: correct_data_flow
diagnostic_assertions.description: Data flows in the right direction (analysis of existing data, not importing new)

diagnostic_assertions.name: actionable_output
diagnostic_assertions.description: Output is actionable, not a dead-end data dump

diagnostic_assertions.name: prompt_specificity
diagnostic_assertions.description: AI prompt references specific fields rather than vague instructions

diagnostic_assertions.name: single_select_quality
diagnostic_assertions.description: SINGLE_SELECT options are mutually exclusive, meaningful, and scannable

diagnostic_assertions.name: action_type_appropriateness
diagnostic_assertions.description: Action type (AI, Formula, Reference) matches the task complexity

diagnostic_assertions.name: source_of_truth_leverage
diagnostic_assertions.description: Leverages available prompt templates, flows, and existing data sources

diagnostic_assertions.name: pipeline_completeness
diagnostic_assertions.description: Suggestion fills a genuine gap in the grid pipeline
